contract.goal: Close Phase 2: delete .claude/scripts/guild/ (4 sources + 4 sibling tests + __smoke-fixtures__/), swap .claude/settings.json permission, update 4 caller skill bodies to use bin/guild <verb>. D5 of 5.
acceptance_criteria: Updated skill bodies: guild-whiteboard, guild-validate, ev-loop-interactive, ev-loop-confidence.
npm run lint + npm test pass; bin/guild --help works; no live grep matches remain (only the intentional regex-fixture string in my own test).
.claude/scripts/ parent dir NOT deleted (P6's survey scope).
rules_applied: Don't freestyle around the substrate: only invocation-surface changes in skill bodies; no orchestration semantics changed.
Respect PLAN.md's open question: parent .claude/scripts/ dir survey is P6, not D5.

actions: grep -rn '.claude/scripts/guild|node .claude/scripts/guild' (excluding archives + this project's checkins + PLAN.md) inventoried all references.
Updated guild-whiteboard/SKILL.md: 4 Bash invocations (detect-round, init, read-state, append) + 1 prose reference, all swapped to bin/guild whiteboard.
Updated ev-loop-interactive/SKILL.md: 3 spots — derive-panel invocation, findings append/count blocks, panel-auto-derivation prose.
Updated ev-loop-confidence/SKILL.md: 2 spots — derive-panel invocation, panel-auto-derivation prose.
Verified grep returns only 1 acceptable match (regex-fixture string in derive-panel.test.ts:167 — not a filesystem reference).
Smoke-tested bin/guild --help and bin/guild derive-panel --files=Foo.tsx — both work.
Ran npm test: 35 files / 470 tests pass. Delta from D4 (39/554): -4 files -84 tests = exactly the 4 deleted .claude/scripts/guild/*.test.ts files.
Spawned evaluator-contract-fit (single-evaluator panel per PANEL-COMPOSITION.md for substrate-authoring + JSON-config files). VERDICT: approved.

changes_since_previous: Closes the bin/guild migration loop. Bin/guild is now the only path; legacy scripts gone.
notes_for_pr: One acceptable grep match remains: .claude/cli/verbs/guild/derive-panel.test.ts:167 uses the path as a regex example string (matches the existing pattern from Phase 1's D4 with the same fixture preservation).

.claude/scripts/ parent directory left alone (now contains just package.json + a never-deleted guild/ entry's __pycache__-style emptiness). PLAN.md open question (parent dir cleanup) is P6's survey scope.

Test count dropped 84 tests from D4's 554 → D5's 470. Net change vs main since Phase 2 start: +37 tests (new .claude/cli/verbs/guild/*.test.ts files contribute 90 tests; 4 deleted legacy test files removed 84). Coverage preserved + slightly expanded (the new tests have more edge cases on EAGAIN handling, ctx-cwd resolution, etc.).
